datasheet.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase , if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength , it must take a Battle-shock test.
datasheet.name: Fear Incarnate (Aura)

datasheet.text: In your Command phase , if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token .
datasheet.name: Pain Adept

unit_composition.text: stinger pistol; Haemonculus tools and scissorhands.
